properties.name: activeid
properties.description: Match with an `id` set on a Tab to mark it as active on initial load

properties.name: connotation
properties.description: Sets the connotation color of the active tab

properties.name: gutters
properties.description: Sets the spacing inside the Tab Panels

properties.name: orientation
properties.description: Sets axis on which the tabs are aligned

properties.name: scrollable-panel
properties.description: Sets whether the Tab Panel will be scrollable (if content height exceeds `block-size`)

properties.name: icon
properties.description: A decorative icon the custom element should have. See the Vivid Icon Gallery for available icons and icon-names

properties.name: icon-trailing
properties.description: Places the icon after the label text

properties.name: shape
properties.description: Shape of the background when hovered

events.name: `change`
events.description: Fired when a tab is clicked or during keyboard navigation

events.name: close
events.description: When `removable` is set, fired when the close button is clicked or the `DELETE` key is pressed

slots.name: default
slots.description: For Tab and Tab Panel components

slots.name: action-items
slots.description: To add action items after the last Tab in the tabs bar
